# HL6 v2.0.2

## 中文

### 封禁用户体验修复

- 修复被封禁用户登录时仅显示「账户已被封禁」错误文本、无法进入 `/banned` 申诉页面的问题（详见下方方案 2）
- 客户端封禁检测由被动触发升级为主动检测：`App.tsx` 的 `ProtectedRoute` 组件在 `user.is_banned` 为 true 且当前路径非 `/banned` 时主动跳转，避免浏览页面不触发 API 时漏检
- 修复申诉页面（`/banned`）多个损坏问题：表单提交逻辑、状态展示、跳转链路

### 日志中心合并（`/admin/logs`）

- 将原 `/admin/audit-logs`（审计日志）、`/admin/email-logs`（邮件日志）、`/admin/logs`（系统日志）三个独立页面合并为单页三 Tab 结构
- Tab 切换通过 URL search params 持久化，支持直达链接分享
- TabsList 采用横向滚动布局，适配 Android 窄屏视口

### 内容审查 + AI 审查合并（`/admin/audit`）

- 将原独立 `/admin/ai-audit` 页面合并到 `/admin/audit`，统一为 7 Tab 工作台（概览/规则/扫描器/工作台/历史/命中率/AI 审查）
- 新增**串联式 AI 接入**：规则引擎先判定，未命中且内容可读时自动触发 AI 二次复核，避免对每个子域名都消耗 LLM token
- 内置三套默认审查规则模板（通用/严格/代码安全），支持变量插值（`{{fqdn}}`/`{{content}}` 等）
- AI 模型配置：API Key 加密存储（AES-256-GCM）、脱敏展示、多模型支持、限流（RPM）、温度调节
- 审查提示词模板：管理员可自定义，支持变量插值
- AI 审查记录独立存储，支持二次管理员复核

### 实名认证系统（新增）

针对备案域名场景，引入完整的实名认证体系：

- **用户侧**：头像下拉菜单新增「账户安全」入口，包含邮箱绑定信息 + 实名认证表单（姓名/身份证号/验证方式）+ 申请历史
- **认证方式**：支持阿里云市场（AppCode 鉴权）、聚合数据（API Key 鉴权）、人工审核三种服务商
- **付费认证**：支持配置固定费用，通过 `PaymentOrder.Type=realname` 复用现有支付链路（易支付/码支付），支付回调按类型分发
- **安全存储**：真实姓名和身份证号通过 AES-256-GCM 加密入库，API 响应仅返回脱敏数据（如 `张*`/`110101********1234`）
- **异步验证**：支付成功后事务内更新状态，事务外 goroutine 异步调用第三方 API，避免拖长事务
- **管理员审核**：`/admin/realname` 页面提供统计卡、筛选、审核（通过/拒绝）、失败重试
- **后台配置**：系统设置新增「实名认证」Tab，含启用开关、认领/充值强制实名、费用、服务商、AppCode/AppKey（加密）、人脸开关
- **数据模型**：`User` 表新增 `realname_status`/`realname_verified_at`/`realname_name` 字段；新建 `realname_applications` 表存储申请单

### 邮件与验证码

- 新增自托管图形验证码（`mojocn/base64Captcha`），后端 `GET /auth/captcha` 接口，前端 `captcha-widget.tsx` 组件集成到注册/忘记密码/激活账户页面，后台可开关
- `verify-email.tsx` 新增 60 秒倒计时重发按钮
- 邮件中转页 `/redirect`：验证和密码设置链接统一走中转页，移除邮件模板内的「在 APP 中打开」按钮
- 验证码组件窄屏堆叠布局优化，适配 Android 视口

### Bug 修复

- 修复 `web/.gitignore` 的 `logs` 规则误屏蔽 `src/pages/admin/logs/` 目录，导致 Docker 构建时 `import @/pages/admin/logs` 找不到模块的问题
- 修复 `audit_service.go` 中 `primaryCh := dual.PrimaryChannel()` 在同函数内重复声明导致的 `no new variables on left side of :=` 编译错误
- 修复 `realname_service.go` 中 `now := time.Now()` 声明未使用的编译错误
- 修复 `handler/realname.go` 中 `fmt.Errorf` 使用但未导入 `fmt` 包的编译错误

### Android 客户端适配

- 封禁检测在共享 React 层实现，Capacitor 打包 `web/dist` 后自动生效，无需原生代码改动
- 所有新页面（实名认证、日志中心、审查工作台）在 Android 窄屏（360px 视口）使用 `max-w-lg` 卡片 + 垂直堆叠 + 水平滚动 TabsList

## English

### Banned User Experience Fixes

- Fixed an issue where banned users logging in only saw an "account banned" error text and could not reach the `/banned` appeal page
- Client-side ban detection upgraded from passive to active: `ProtectedRoute` in `App.tsx` now actively navigates when `user.is_banned` is true and the current path is not `/banned`, preventing missed detection when browsing pages that don't trigger API calls
- Fixed multiple broken behaviors on the appeal page (`/banned`): form submission, status display, and navigation flow

### Log Center Consolidation (`/admin/logs`)

- Merged three formerly separate pages (`/admin/audit-logs`, `/admin/email-logs`, `/admin/logs`) into a single page with three tabs
- Tab selection is persisted via URL search params, supporting direct-link sharing
- TabsList uses a horizontal scroll layout to adapt to narrow Android viewports

### Content Audit + AI Audit Merge (`/admin/audit`)

- Merged the formerly standalone `/admin/ai-audit` page into `/admin/audit`, unified as a 7-tab workbench (overview / rules / scanner / workbench / history / hit-rate / AI review)
- Added **series AI integration**: the rule engine judges first; AI is only triggered for a second-pass review when rules do not match and content is readable, avoiding wasted LLM tokens on every subdomain
- Built-in three default audit rule templates (general / strict / code security) with variable interpolation (`{{fqdn}}` / `{{content}}`, etc.)
- AI model configuration: API key encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM), masked display, multi-model support, rate limiting (RPM), temperature control
- Audit prompt templates: admin-customizable with variable interpolation
- AI review records are stored separately, supporting secondary admin review

### Real-Name Authentication System (New)

Introduces a complete real-name authentication system for filed-domain scenarios:

- **User side**: New "Account Security" entry in the avatar dropdown, containing email binding info + real-name auth form (name / ID card / verification method) + application history
- **Providers**: Supports Aliyun Market (AppCode auth), Juhe (API Key auth), and manual review
- **Paid verification**: Supports a configurable fixed fee, reusing the existing payment pipeline (epay / codepay) via `PaymentOrder.Type=realname`; payment callbacks dispatch by type
- **Secure storage**: Real name and ID card are encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM; API responses return only masked data (e.g., `张*` / `110101********1234`)
- **Async verification**: On payment success, status is updated inside the transaction and the third-party API is called asynchronously in a goroutine outside the transaction to avoid long transactions
- **Admin review**: The `/admin/realname` page provides stat cards, filters, review (approve / reject), and failure retry
- **Backend config**: New "Real-Name Auth" tab in system settings, with enable toggle, required-for-claim / required-for-payment toggles, fee, provider, AppCode / AppKey (encrypted), face toggle
- **Data model**: `User` table adds `realname_status` / `realname_verified_at` / `realname_name`; new `realname_applications` table for applications

### Email & Captcha

- Added self-hosted image captcha (`mojocn/base64Captcha`): backend `GET /auth/captcha` endpoint, frontend `captcha-widget.tsx` integrated into registration / forgot-password / activation pages, admin toggle
- `verify-email.tsx` now has a 60-second countdown resend button
- Email relay page `/redirect`: verification and password-setup links go through the relay page; the "Open in APP" button inside email templates was removed
- Captcha widget narrow-screen stacked layout optimized for Android viewports

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed `web/.gitignore` `logs` rule mistakenly ignoring the `src/pages/admin/logs/` directory, causing the Docker build to fail with `Cannot find module '@/pages/admin/logs'`
- Fixed `audit_service.go` compile error `no new variables on left side of :=` caused by re-declaring `primaryCh` in the same function
- Fixed `realname_service.go` compile error from an unused `now := time.Now()` declaration
- Fixed `handler/realname.go` compile error from using `fmt.Errorf` without importing the `fmt` package

### Android Client Adaptation

- Ban detection is implemented in the shared React layer; Capacitor packaging of `web/dist` applies it automatically without native code changes
- All new pages (real-name auth, log center, audit workbench) use `max-w-lg` cards + vertical stacking + horizontally scrollable TabsList on narrow Android viewports (360px)
